summary: Record the approved Phase 0A/0B scope split and clear the prior human gate for local-only backfill execution.
acceptance_criteria: PROJECT_STATUS records that the human accepted the current local MVP as Phase 0A complete and approved Phase 0B local-only backfill.
The prior human gate is cleared only for the approved local admin gate and Radar Task UI backfill scope.
Production auth, public deployment, paid providers, CI/CD, DNS, commercial release, and real account decisions remain human-gated.
Goal-mode state points at M7/Phase 0B and lists the newly approved ready tasks.
Follow-up M7 task packets and thread registry state are consistent with dependency order.
No product code, runtime behavior, dependencies, or deployment configuration is changed.
notes: Derived from the human decision on 2026-06-29 approving the recommended scope split: Phase 0A complete, Phase 0B local admin gate plus Radar Task UI, mock-provider/default local-only policy retained.
This is a short reconciliation task so the autonomous loop can safely continue without silently crossing the previous human gate.

Pauli requested changes because M7-LOCAL-ADMIN-GATE-001 had briefly been marked IN_PROGRESS before this prerequisite closed and because the task packet did not list follow-up task packets/thread registry as allowed paths. The task was moved back to READY, the UI prereview thread was detached from the DRAFT task, admin-gate product edits were stashed out of this reconciliation diff, and this packet now lists the coordination files it owns.
non_goals: No real provider, deployment, CI/CD, DNS, public release, or paid service setup.
No docs rewrite beyond current project status and goal-mode state.
